'''Brainworm Rot Type B''' was a less lethal version of [[Brainworm Rot Type A]]; however, it could rapidly mutate into Type A if left unchecked. It was a subtype of the [[Brainrot Plague]].

The new strain of Type B was discovered c. [[1 ABY/Legends|1 ABY]] to be thriving among creature lairs. [[Wol Cabasshite/Legends|Wol Cabasshite]] [[Ambassador/Legends|Ambassador]] [[Lurll]] spearheaded a campaign on [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]] to kill off all infected animals, to prevent further spread.

Like [[Brainworm Rot Type C]], it is likely that this subtype malady originated on [[Neimoidia/Legends|Neimoidia]].
